form.formComment: Resuming today after only having had one start and then had five months break. At debut last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on November 9 over 1100m, 10 len behind Romantic Miss with 59.5kg at $31. Had eight recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial won an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Prefer to see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Resuming today after only having had one start and then had five months break. At debut last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on November 9 over 1100m, 10 len behind Romantic Miss with 59.5kg at $31. Had eight recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial won an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 4th of 12 at Terang Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1406m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Regal Ascend with 57.5kg at $61. Last start 8th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 1607m, slow going 9 len behind Dealer Sing with 57.5kg at $51. Prepared to risk on recent form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today. Resuming 4th of 12 at Terang Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1406m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Regal Ascend with 57.5kg at $61. Last start 8th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 1607m, slow going 9 len behind Dealer Sing with 57.5kg at $51. Prepared to risk on recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a short distance near the 300m.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 7th of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 5 len behind Western Lane with 59kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 4th of 12 at Pakenham Synthetic Mdn-Sw on July 28 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Star Angel carrying 57kg at $4.80. Rates highly and expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and shortly after hampered by Fearless Monarch.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 9 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, slow going long-neck behind She's A Jett with 59kg at $7. Can go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). At debut, 2nd of 9 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, slow going long-neck behind She's A Jett with 59kg at $7. Can go one better.

form.formComment: Gelding by Russian Camelot making his first appearance. Finished sixth in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Keep very safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Russian Camelot making his first appearance. Finished sixth in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Keep very safe.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 7 at Seymour 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 12 over 1200m, 9 len behind Ludlum with 58kg at $10. Everything points to a effective return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 7 at Seymour 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 12 over 1200m, 9 len behind Ludlum with 58kg at $10. Everything points to a effective return.

form.formComment: Most recently got back early 6th of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1606m, 5.5 len behind Hurco with 57.5kg at $61. Before that 7th of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, 4 len behind It's All Calm carrying 57.5kg at $17. Might struggle again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Most recently got back early 6th of 9 at Ararat Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1606m, 5.5 len behind Hurco with 57.5kg at $61. Before that 7th of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, 4 len behind It's All Calm carrying 57.5kg at $17. Might struggle again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced keenly in the middle stages.
Approaching the winning post, shifted in.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 9 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1461m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Crazy Town with 57.5kg at $7.50. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Let It Beel with 57.5kg at $101. Needs to improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). At the latest run 7th of 9 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1461m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Crazy Town with 57.5kg at $7.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Over-raced in the early and middle stages.
Raced keenly in the middle stages.
Began awkwardly. Shortly after the start, shifted in.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 5th of 11 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1200m, 3 len behind Deliberate Ploy carrying 55kg at $10. Second-up 4th of 10 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5 len behind I Said So carrying 57kg at $4.80. Well placed and gets her chance to break through.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Power And The Beat with 57kg at $61. The run before that 4th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Prince Pienza carrying 57kg at $31. Not far away last start. Can make the finish.
